description: OWASP WSTG: Enumerate Infrastructure and Application Admin Interfaces. Full methodology at canonical_url.

title: Test HTTP Methods
description: OWASP WSTG: Test HTTP Methods. Full methodology at canonical_url.
detection_methods: Look for route definitions accepting unintended HTTP methods (TRACE, OPTIONS, PUT, DELETE) without explicit handling.

title: Test HTTP Strict Transport Security
description: OWASP WSTG: Test HTTP Strict Transport Security. Full methodology at canonical_url.
detection_methods: Search for HSTS header configuration; verify max-age >= 31536000 and includeSubDomains.

title: Test RIA Cross Domain Policy
description: OWASP WSTG: Test RIA Cross Domain Policy. Full methodology at canonical_url.

title: Test File Permission
description: OWASP WSTG: Test File Permission. Full methodology at canonical_url.

title: Test for Subdomain Takeover
description: OWASP WSTG: Test for Subdomain Takeover. Full methodology at canonical_url.

title: Test Cloud Storage
description: OWASP WSTG: Test Cloud Storage. Full methodology at canonical_url.

title: Test for Content Security Policy
description: OWASP WSTG: Test for Content Security Policy. Full methodology at canonical_url.
detection_methods: Search for Content-Security-Policy header configuration; verify no 'unsafe-inline'/'unsafe-eval' in script-src.

title: Test for Path Confusion
description: OWASP WSTG: Test for Path Confusion. Full methodology at canonical_url.

title: Test Other HTTP Security Header Misconfigurations
description: OWASP WSTG: Test Other HTTP Security Header Misconfigurations. Full methodology at canonical_url.
detection_methods: Check for X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff, X-Frame-Options or CSP frame-ancestors, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy.

title: Test Role Definitions
description: OWASP WSTG: Test Role Definitions. Full methodology at canonical_url.

title: Test User Registration Process
description: OWASP WSTG: Test User Registration Process. Full methodology at canonical_url.

title: Test Account Provisioning Process
description: OWASP WSTG: Test Account Provisioning Process. Full methodology at canonical_url.

title: Testing for Account Enumeration and Guessable User Account
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing for Account Enumeration and Guessable User Account. Full methodology at canonical_url.

title: Testing for Weak or Unenforced Username Policy
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing for Weak or Unenforced Username Policy. Full methodology at canonical_url.

title: Testing for Credentials Transported over an Encrypted Channel
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing for Credentials Transported over an Encrypted Channel. Full methodology at canonical_url.
detection_methods: Find login forms / auth endpoints. Verify they require HTTPS and that credentials never appear in URLs or query strings.

title: Testing for Default Credentials
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing for Default Credentials. Full methodology at canonical_url.
detection_methods: Search for hardcoded credentials, default admin accounts, sample users in seed/migration files, README admin creds.

title: Testing for Weak Lock Out Mechanism
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing for Weak Lock Out Mechanism. Full methodology at canonical_url.

title: Testing for Bypassing Authentication Schema
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing for Bypassing Authentication Schema. Full methodology at canonical_url.

title: Testing for Vulnerable Remember Password
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing for Vulnerable Remember Password. Full methodology at canonical_url.

title: Testing for Browser Cache Weaknesses
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing for Browser Cache Weaknesses. Full methodology at canonical_url.

title: Testing for Weak Authentication Methods
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing for Weak Authentication Methods. Full methodology at canonical_url.

title: Testing for Weak Security Question Answer
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing for Weak Security Question Answer. Full methodology at canonical_url.

title: Testing for Weak Password Change or Reset Functionalities
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing for Weak Password Change or Reset Functionalities. Full methodology at canonical_url.
detection_methods: Locate password reset / change flows. Check token entropy, single-use, expiry, rate limiting, lack of user enumeration in responses.

title: Testing for Weaker Authentication in Alternative Channel
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing for Weaker Authentication in Alternative Channel. Full methodology at canonical_url.

title: Testing Multi-Factor Authentication
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing Multi-Factor Authentication. Full methodology at canonical_url.
detection_methods: Identify MFA enrollment and verification code paths. Check rate limiting, code reuse, fallback weakening, recovery code handling.

title: Testing Directory Traversal File Include
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing Directory Traversal File Include. Full methodology at canonical_url.
detection_methods: Find file path / include / template-load operations using user input. Check for ../, encoded traversal, absolute path acceptance.

title: Testing for Bypassing Authorization Schema
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing for Bypassing Authorization Schema. Full methodology at canonical_url.
detection_methods: Compare auth checks across endpoints. Look for missing decorators, role checks bypassed by parameter manipulation, IDOR-adjacent gaps.

title: Testing for Privilege Escalation
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing for Privilege Escalation. Full methodology at canonical_url.
detection_methods: Look for role/privilege fields in user input or session data that are trusted without server-side verification.

title: Testing for Insecure Direct Object References
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing for Insecure Direct Object References. Full methodology at canonical_url.
detection_methods: Find handlers that load resources by ID from user input without an ownership/permission check.

title: Testing for OAuth Weaknesses
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing for OAuth Weaknesses. Full methodology at canonical_url.

title: Testing for OAuth Authorization Server Weaknesses
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing for OAuth Authorization Server Weaknesses. Full methodology at canonical_url.

title: Testing for OAuth Client Weaknesses
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing for OAuth Client Weaknesses. Full methodology at canonical_url.

title: Testing for Session Management Schema
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing for Session Management Schema. Full methodology at canonical_url.

title: Testing for Cookies Attributes
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing for Cookies Attributes. Full methodology at canonical_url.
detection_methods: Search session/cookie configuration. Verify Secure, HttpOnly, SameSite are set; check Path and Domain scoping.

title: Testing for Session Fixation
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing for Session Fixation. Full methodology at canonical_url.
detection_methods: Check that login regenerates session IDs (no fixation). Look for session_regenerate_id, login.session.cycle, etc.

title: Testing for Exposed Session Variables
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing for Exposed Session Variables. Full methodology at canonical_url.

title: Testing for Cross Site Request Forgery
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing for Cross Site Request Forgery. Full methodology at canonical_url.
detection_methods: Identify state-changing endpoints (POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE). Verify CSRF token middleware or SameSite=Strict cookie posture.

title: Testing for Logout Functionality
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing for Logout Functionality. Full methodology at canonical_url.

title: Testing Session Timeout
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing Session Timeout. Full methodology at canonical_url.
detection_methods: Find session timeout configuration; verify both idle and absolute timeouts are enforced.

title: Testing for Session Puzzling
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing for Session Puzzling. Full methodology at canonical_url.

title: Testing for Session Hijacking
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing for Session Hijacking. Full methodology at canonical_url.

title: Testing JSON Web Tokens
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing JSON Web Tokens. Full methodology at canonical_url.
detection_methods: Locate JWT issuance and verification. Check algorithm allowlist (no 'none', no HS/RS confusion), expiry, signing-key rotation, claim validation.

title: Testing for Concurrent Sessions
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing for Concurrent Sessions. Full methodology at canonical_url.

title: Testing for Reflected Cross Site Scripting
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing for Reflected Cross Site Scripting. Full methodology at canonical_url.
detection_methods: Find templates rendering user input without escaping. Check for raw|safe filters, dangerouslySetInnerHTML, innerHTML assignments.

title: Testing for Stored Cross Site Scripting
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing for Stored Cross Site Scripting. Full methodology at canonical_url.
detection_methods: Trace user input that is persisted (DB, file, cache) and later rendered. Check for escaping at output, not just input.

title: Testing for HTTP Verb Tampering
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing for HTTP Verb Tampering. Full methodology at canonical_url.

title: Testing for HTTP Parameter Pollution
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing for HTTP Parameter Pollution. Full methodology at canonical_url.

title: Testing for SQL Injection
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing for SQL Injection. Full methodology at canonical_url.
detection_methods: Find query construction with string interpolation/concatenation. Flag .format/f-strings/% with user input, raw cursor.execute, ORM raw().

title: Testing for Oracle
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing for Oracle. Full methodology at canonical_url.

title: Testing for MySQL
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing for MySQL. Full methodology at canonical_url.

title: Testing for SQL Server
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing for SQL Server. Full methodology at canonical_url.

title: Testing PostgreSQL
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing PostgreSQL. Full methodology at canonical_url.

title: Testing for MS Access
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing for MS Access. Full methodology at canonical_url.

title: Testing for NoSQL Injection
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing for NoSQL Injection. Full methodology at canonical_url.

title: Testing for ORM Injection
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing for ORM Injection. Full methodology at canonical_url.

title: Testing for Client-side
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing for Client-side. Full methodology at canonical_url.

title: Testing for LDAP Injection
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing for LDAP Injection. Full methodology at canonical_url.

title: Testing for XML Injection
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing for XML Injection. Full methodology at canonical_url.
detection_methods: Look for XML parsing (lxml, xml.etree, defusedxml absence). Check for external entity disabling, DTD disabling.

title: Testing for SSI Injection
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing for SSI Injection. Full methodology at canonical_url.

title: Testing for XPath Injection
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing for XPath Injection. Full methodology at canonical_url.

title: Testing for IMAP SMTP Injection
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing for IMAP SMTP Injection. Full methodology at canonical_url.

title: Testing for Code Injection
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing for Code Injection. Full methodology at canonical_url.
detection_methods: Search for eval, exec, compile, Function() constructor, vm.runInContext — flag any with user-influenced input.

title: Testing for File Inclusion
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing for File Inclusion. Full methodology at canonical_url.

title: Testing for Command Injection
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing for Command Injection. Full methodology at canonical_url.
detection_methods: Search for shell invocation: subprocess with shell=True, os.system, popen, Runtime.exec, child_process.exec — flag user-influenced args.

title: Testing for Format String Injection
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing for Format String Injection. Full methodology at canonical_url.

title: Testing for Incubated Vulnerability
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing for Incubated Vulnerability. Full methodology at canonical_url.

title: Testing for HTTP Response Splitting
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing for HTTP Response Splitting. Full methodology at canonical_url.

title: Testing for HTTP Request Smuggling
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing for HTTP Request Smuggling. Full methodology at canonical_url.

title: Testing for Host Header Injection
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing for Host Header Injection. Full methodology at canonical_url.

title: Testing for Server-side Template Injection
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing for Server-side Template Injection. Full methodology at canonical_url.
detection_methods: Find template engine usage (Jinja2, Twig, ERB, Handlebars). Flag template strings constructed from user input.

title: Testing for Server-Side Request Forgery
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing for Server-Side Request Forgery. Full methodology at canonical_url.
detection_methods: Find HTTP client calls (requests.get, urllib, fetch, axios) with URL or host derived from user input. Check for allowlist / metadata-IP blocking.

title: Testing for Mass Assignment
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing for Mass Assignment. Full methodology at canonical_url.
detection_methods: Find ORM/serializer bulk-assign patterns (Model(**data), update(**data), Object.assign). Check for explicit field allowlists.

title: Testing for CSV Injection
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing for CSV Injection. Full methodology at canonical_url.

title: Testing for Improper Error Handling
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing for Improper Error Handling. Full methodology at canonical_url.
detection_methods: Find global exception handlers. Check that responses don't leak stack traces, query fragments, file paths, or internal IPs in production.

title: Testing for Stack Traces
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing for Stack Traces. Full methodology at canonical_url.
detection_methods: Search for debug/development settings active in production paths (DEBUG=True, app.debug, NODE_ENV checks).

title: Testing for Weak Transport Layer Security
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing for Weak Transport Layer Security. Full methodology at canonical_url.

title: Testing for Padding Oracle
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing for Padding Oracle. Full methodology at canonical_url.

title: Testing for Sensitive Information Sent via Unencrypted Channels
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing for Sensitive Information Sent via Unencrypted Channels. Full methodology at canonical_url.
detection_methods: Find HTTP (non-S) requests, plaintext credential storage, plaintext PII in logs, unencrypted DB columns for sensitive fields.

title: Testing for Weak Cryptographic Primitives
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing for Weak Cryptographic Primitives. Full methodology at canonical_url.
detection_methods: Search for MD5, SHA1, DES, RC4, ECB mode, hardcoded IVs, hardcoded keys, weak random (random.random for security).

title: Test Business Logic Data Validation
description: OWASP WSTG: Test Business Logic Data Validation. Full methodology at canonical_url.

title: Test Ability to Forge Requests
description: OWASP WSTG: Test Ability to Forge Requests. Full methodology at canonical_url.

title: Test Integrity Checks
description: OWASP WSTG: Test Integrity Checks. Full methodology at canonical_url.

title: Test for Process Timing
description: OWASP WSTG: Test for Process Timing. Full methodology at canonical_url.

title: Test Number of Times a Function Can Be Used Limits
description: OWASP WSTG: Test Number of Times a Function Can Be Used Limits. Full methodology at canonical_url.

title: Testing for the Circumvention of Work Flows
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing for the Circumvention of Work Flows. Full methodology at canonical_url.

title: Test Defenses Against Application Misuse
description: OWASP WSTG: Test Defenses Against Application Misuse. Full methodology at canonical_url.

title: Test Upload of Unexpected File Types
description: OWASP WSTG: Test Upload of Unexpected File Types. Full methodology at canonical_url.

title: Test Upload of Malicious Files
description: OWASP WSTG: Test Upload of Malicious Files. Full methodology at canonical_url.

title: Test Payment Functionality
description: OWASP WSTG: Test Payment Functionality. Full methodology at canonical_url.

title: Testing for DOM-Based Cross Site Scripting
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing for DOM-Based Cross Site Scripting. Full methodology at canonical_url.
detection_methods: Find client-side use of location.hash, document.URL, window.name written to innerHTML, document.write, eval, or Function().

title: Testing for Self DOM Based Cross-Site Scripting
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing for Self DOM Based Cross-Site Scripting. Full methodology at canonical_url.

title: Testing for JavaScript Execution
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing for JavaScript Execution. Full methodology at canonical_url.

title: Testing for HTML Injection
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing for HTML Injection. Full methodology at canonical_url.

title: Testing for Client-side URL Redirect
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing for Client-side URL Redirect. Full methodology at canonical_url.

title: Testing for CSS Injection
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing for CSS Injection. Full methodology at canonical_url.

title: Testing for Client-side Resource Manipulation
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing for Client-side Resource Manipulation. Full methodology at canonical_url.

title: Testing Cross Origin Resource Sharing
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing Cross Origin Resource Sharing. Full methodology at canonical_url.
detection_methods: Search for Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * with Access-Control-Allow-Credentials: true; reflected origins without allowlist.

title: Testing for Cross Site Flashing
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing for Cross Site Flashing. Full methodology at canonical_url.

title: Testing for Clickjacking
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing for Clickjacking. Full methodology at canonical_url.
detection_methods: Verify pages set X-Frame-Options or CSP frame-ancestors, especially state-changing or auth-sensitive pages.

title: Testing WebSockets
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing WebSockets. Full methodology at canonical_url.

title: Testing Web Messaging
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing Web Messaging. Full methodology at canonical_url.

title: Testing Browser Storage
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing Browser Storage. Full methodology at canonical_url.

title: Testing for Cross Site Script Inclusion
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing for Cross Site Script Inclusion. Full methodology at canonical_url.

title: Testing for Reverse Tabnabbing
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing for Reverse Tabnabbing. Full methodology at canonical_url.

title: Testing for Client-side Template Injection
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing for Client-side Template Injection. Full methodology at canonical_url.

title: API Reconnaissance
description: OWASP WSTG: API Reconnaissance. Full methodology at canonical_url.

title: API Broken Object Level Authorization
description: OWASP WSTG: API Broken Object Level Authorization. Full methodology at canonical_url.
detection_methods: For each API endpoint accepting an object ID, verify ownership/permission check before action.

title: Testing for Excessive Data Exposure
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing for Excessive Data Exposure. Full methodology at canonical_url.
detection_methods: Find API responses that return whole records. Check for serializer field allowlists; flag select_all / *.dict() patterns.

title: API Broken Function Level Authorization
description: OWASP WSTG: API Broken Function Level Authorization. Full methodology at canonical_url.
detection_methods: Compare admin vs user endpoint authorization. Look for endpoints whose only protection is URL obscurity or client-side hiding.

title: Testing GraphQL
description: OWASP WSTG: Testing GraphQL. Full methodology at canonical_url.
